name: Minimum time taken to burn the BT from a given Node
category: Binary Trees [Traversals, Medium and Hard Problems]
statement:
Given a target node data and a root of binary tree. If the target is set on fire, determine the shortest amount of time needed to burn the entire binary tree.


It is known that in 1 second all nodes connected to a given node get burned. That is its left child, right child, and parent.
constraints:
• 1 <= Number of Nodes <= 104
  • -105 <= Node.val <= 105
  • All Node.val values are unique.
  • target will always be present in tree

examples.explanation: The node with value 1 is set on fire. In 1st second it burns node 2 and node 3. In 2nd second it burns nodes 4, 5, 6. In 3rd second it burns node 7.
The node with value 4 is set on fire. In 1st second it burns node 3. In 2nd second it burns node 1. In 3rd second it burns node 2. In 4th second it burns node 5.
